## Description

Summary of the changes made in this pull request.

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring / Code Quality improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification Steps

1. Run `npm test` to verify unit tests pass.
2. Run `npm run build` to verify production build succeeds.
3. Test UI or API functional changes locally via `npm run dev:pages`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code complies with project style standards.
- [ ] No extraneous comments or secret keys added.
- [ ] Local tests pass.
- [ ] Production build succeeds.
